title: Implement durable memory tiers (ephemeral, durable, archival)
summary: M3 roadmap item: Implement memory tiers with different retention and cost characteristics.
acceptance: Three memory tiers implemented (ephemeral, durable, archival)
Automatic tier promotion/demotion based on access patterns
impact: High - M3 feature, enables cost-effective long-term memory
notes: Foundation exists with TTL. Need tiering logic and archival implementation.
